error_signature: Wait node not executing at specified time
title: Wait node not executing as expected with ISO format
symptom: The Wait node configured with 'At Specified Time' option does not execute and keeps waiting indefinitely, breaking the workflow logic.
applies_when: Using Wait node with 'At Specified Time' option
not_this_if: Wait node configured with relative time
root_cause: The issue arises because the `toISOString()` method always outputs the time in UTC, which may not align with the intended local time for execution. This can lead to the Wait node not triggering as expected.
fix_steps: Remove the use of `toISOString()` in your date formatting
Test the Wait node again to ensure it executes at the specified time
agent_instruction: Change the date formatting in the Wait node to use `.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss')`.
